displayTitle: Knights of the Old Republic #34: Vindication, Part 3
synopsis: The secret Jedi Covenant has one leader, but it isn't the devoted Jedi seer, Lady Krynda Draay . . . As Padawan Zayne Carrick struggles to clear his name, the Masters who framed him for murder are finding the ideals they have worked so hard to protect are crumbling. They have been deceived by a trusted advisor whose hostile takeover will pit the Jedi Knights against one another-true Jedi of the Order vs. the misguided Jedi of the Covenant! * Brian Ching, the artist who kicked off the series, returns for the climactic end of this major storyline!
title: Knights of the Old Republic #34: Vindication, Part 3
